case_title: WESTERN GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY VS. MICHAEL SCOTT HARWICK ET AL

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 200034967)
DECLARATION OF JORDAN D. TAYLOR IN OPPOSITION TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE (TRANSACTION ID # 200031998) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WESTERN GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF AUG-24-2021 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WESTERN GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT HARWICK, MICHAEL SCOTT DOES 1 TO 5 INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAR-24-2021 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-25-2021 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAR-01-2021
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAR-24-2021 CONTINUED TO MAY-05-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-22-2021 CONTINUED TO AUG-24-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF WESTERN GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-22-2021 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE MAY-05-2021 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
